messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- BAC: growth archetype
- XYZ: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: [Form 4/A] BANK OF AMERICA CORP /DE/ Amended Insider Trading Activity - Stock Titan
    Summary: [Form 4/A] BANK OF AMERICA CORP /DE/ Amended Insider Trading Activity Stock Titan

[1] Title: ANTPOOL, Block Inc, F2Pool, Foundry, Spiderpool, MARA Foundation & DMND Join Stratum v2 Working Group - Bitcoin Magazine
    Summary: ANTPOOL, Block Inc, F2Pool, Foundry, Spiderpool, MARA Foundation & DMND Join Stratum v2 Working Group Bitcoin Magazine

[2] Title: Block stock climbs after 2026 guidance boost following hefty Q1 earnings beat (XYZ:NYSE) - Seeking Alpha
    Summary: Block stock climbs after 2026 guidance boost following hefty Q1 earnings beat (XYZ:NYSE) Seeking Alpha

[3] Title: Earnings call transcript: Block Inc. raises 2026 guidance after strong Q1 - Investing.com
    Summary: Earnings call transcript: Block Inc. raises 2026 guidance after strong Q1 Investing.com

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["BAC"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Form 4/A reveals insider trading activity for BAC, a held position, which can signal management sentiment."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Block Inc's participation in Bitcoin mining infrastructure working group is a thematic crypto piece with no direct stock price impact or ticker-specific relevance."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["XYZ"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "XYZ stock climbs on strong Q1 earnings beat and raised 2026 guidance, directly impacting the growth position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["XYZ"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Earnings call transcript details guidance raise and Q1 performance, providing material information for the XYZ growth position."
  }
]
```
